snippet.title: Kochu Kunjintachanoru Remix | Vaazha 2 |Official Video Song | Kalabhavan Mani | Sidhartha Vijayan
snippet.description:
Watch : Kochu Kunjintachanoru Remix | Vaazha 2 | Official Video Song | Kalabhavan Mani | Sidhartha Vijayan

Get ready to vibe with the power-packed remix of “Kochu Kunjinte Achan Oru” from Vaazha 2! 💥.
Lyrics Written by Kalabhavan Mani, Music Composed by Sidhartha Vijayan and Sung by Kalabhavan Mani.

Song Credits :
Song : Kochu Kunjinte achan oru
Music : Sidhartha Vijayan
Lyrics : Kalabhavan Mani
Singer : Kalabhavan Mani

Movie Credits:

Director : Savin SA
Writer : Vipin Das 
Producers : Vipin Das, Harris Desom, Sahu Garapati, P.B Anish, Adarsh Narayan, Icon Studios 
DOP : Akhil Lailasuran
Editor : Kannan Mohan 
Music Supervision : Ankit Menon 
Background Score : A TEAM 
Songs Composers : Malayali Monkeys, Rajat Prakash (Hatsmyth) , Parvatish Pradeep, Rzee, Muthu, Arcado, Jazir Muhammed, Ashwin Aryan & Electronic Kili
Sound Design : Arun S Mani 
Sound Mixing : Vishnu Sujathan 
Production Design : Babu Pillai 
Costumes : Aswathy Jayakumar 
Makeup : Sudhi Surendran 
Action Directors : Kalai Kingson , G.Vicky Nandagopal 
Executive Producer : Kanishka Gopishetty 
Production Controller : Rinny Divakar 
Production Executive : Aneesh Nandipulam
Finance Controller : Kiran Nettayam
Chief Associate Director : Rejivan Abdul Basheer
VFX : D.T.M VFX 
Colourist : Joyner Thomas 
DI – Sapthaa Vision
First Look and Title Design : Sarcasanam 
Design : Yellowtooths 
Title Graphics : Sarathvinu (IdentLabs)
Stills : Bijith Dharmadom
Subtitle : Vivek Ranjith 
Release : Icon Cinemas 
PRO : A.S. Dinesh 
Online Marketing : 10g Media 
Marketing : Ting

snippet.title: KD Official Trailer | KVN | Prems | Dhruva Sarja | Reeshma | Sanjay Dutt | Arjun Janya | Suprith
snippet.description:
Warning: High-octane action ahead! ⚠️ Dhruva Sarja & Prem's #KDTheDevil trailer is a blockbuster blast! 💣

Presenting  KD OFFICIAL TRIALER  From The Movie KD-The Devil Starring: Dhruva Sarja, Reeshma Nanaiah, Shilpa Shetty, Sanjay Dutt, Ramesh Aravind & Others
Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 

#KDTHEDEVIL #anandaudio #KVNProductions #KD #officialtrailer #kdteaser #prems #dhruvasarja #reeshmananaiah #arjunjanya #sunjaydutt  #norafatehi #shilpashetty #ramesharavind #vravichandran #suprith  #yashshetty #ravishankar #trailer #kannadanewtrailer #showmanprem #youtube #anandaudio

♪ Original Score Composed and arranged by : Arjun Janya

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

snippet.title: Sapne Vs Everyone Season 2 - Official Trailer | Ambrish Verma, Paramvir Singh Cheema, Vijayant Kohli
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Sapne Vs Everyone Season 2 Official Trailer 
Starring Ambrish Verma, Paramvir Singh Cheema, Vijayant Kohli, Abhishek Chauhan, Nidhi Shah, Khushali Kumar, Naveen Kasturia, Vaishak Shankar
Directed by Ambrish Verma
Written by Ambrish Verma
Production Company: The Viral Fever

Official Release Date - May 1, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Two men chase their dreams in different worlds: Prashant battles Mumbai’s ruthless film industry to build his career, while Jimmy, a real estate salesman known as the “Sales God,” will stop at nothing to take revenge on his Mama as both question whether destiny is decided by fate or by those bold enough to take control of it.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

snippet.title: Raja Shivaji Hindi Trailer | Riteish D | Genelia D | Sanjay D | In Cinemas 1 May 2026
snippet.description:
A legacy that built Swarajya. A story that shaped history. 🚩

Proudly presenting the trailer of Raja Shivaji.

Based on the life of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj - the Founder of Hindavi Swarajya.


Raja Shivaji in cinemas on 1st May 2026.
Marathi, Hindi & Telugu.

Jio Studios Presents
A Mumbai Film Company Production
Raja Shivaji
Written, Produced, Directed By: Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Produced By: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced By: Genelia Deshmukh
Music By: Ajay – Atul
Cinematographer: Santosh Sivan (ASC, ISC)
In Cinemas 1st May
A Jio Studios Release
 
Story Screenplay: Ajit Wadikar, Sandeep Patil, Riteish Vilasrao Deshmukh
Dialogue Writer: Prajakt Deshmukh
Additional Hindi Dialogues: Jaideep Yadav
Editor: Urvashi Saxena
Background Score: John Stewart Eduri
Production Designer: Nikhil Kovale, Apurva Bhagat, Shashank Tere
Associate Producer: Nandita Sachdev
Executive Producer: Sandeep Patil
Casting Director: Rohan Mapuskar
Sound Designer: Kunal & Parikshit
Primary Costume Designer: Rushi Sharma & Manoshi Nath
Secondary Costume Designer: Pournima Oak
Additional Wardrobe / Styling: Nafs [Rizwan Shaikh & Deeksha Sharma Khan]
Action Director: Dawid Szatarski & Manohar Verma
Hair-Makeup Designer: Audrey Sangma, Nitin Indulkar, Hakim Aalim & Kanta Motwani
Chief Assistant Director: Charul Patil
Director’s Assistant: Chandni Kargathra
Research Consultant: Ketan Puri
CG & VFX: Assemblage Entertainment
VFX Head of Production: Swapnil Khotkar
VFX Supervisor: Pushpendra Dubey & Swapnil Ambre
Di Studio: Prime Focus Limited
Di Colorist: Ashirwad Hadkar
Post Producer: Takshit Pradhan
Visual Promotion: Just Right Studioz NX
 
Jio Studios Team:
COO & CFO: Priyanka Chaudhary
CEO Production & Distribution: Deepak Sharma
Head – Marathi Content: Nikhil Sane
Chief Legal Officer: Dipti Kotak
PR Head: Amita Naidu
 
Raja Shivaji, based on the life of India’s Greatest Warrior King – Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj, who rose against formidable powers to lay the foundation of Swarajya. Experience this grand historical spectacle on the big screen, unfolding in Marathi, Hindi & Telugu

snippet.title: Clayface | Official Teaser
snippet.description:
Look fear in the face. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters this October. 

DC Studios’ first-ever foray into the genre, “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the Gotham City villain.

“Clayface” unravels one man’s horrifying descent from rising Hollywood star to revenge-filled monster in a story that explores the loss of one’s identity and humanity,
corrosive love, and the dark underbelly of scientific ambition.

The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Rafi Crohn, Paul Ritchie, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther executive producing.

Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris, visual effects supervisor Angus Bickerton, costume designer Keith Madden, and casting director Lucy Bevan. 

DC Studios Presents, in association with Domain Entertainment, a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.

snippet.description:
Presenting  KD OFFICIAL TRIALER  From The Movie KD-The Devil Starring: Dhruva Sarja, Reeshma Nanaiah, Shilpa Shetty, Sanjay Dutt, Ramesh Aravind & Others

#KDTHEDEVIL  #KVNProductions #KD #officialtrailer #kdteaser #prems #dhruvasarja #reeshmananaiah #arjunjanya #sunjaydutt  #norafatehi #shilpashetty #ramesharavind #vravichandran #suprith  #yashshetty #ravishankar #trailer #kannadanewtrailer #showmanprem #youtubeshorts 




🌟 MAJAA SCREEN – ಮಜಾ ಶುರುವಾಗೋದು ಇಲ್ಲಿಂದಲೇ! 🎥
ಸಿನಿಮಾ ಪ್ರೀತಿ, ನಗು, ಸಸ್ಪೆನ್ಸ್, ಡ್ರಾಮಾ, ಎಲ್ಲವನ್ನೂ ಒಂದೇ ಕಡೆ ತರುತ್ತಿರುವ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಪ್ರಿಯ ಯೂಟ್ಯೂಬ್ ಚಾನಲ್!

MAJAA SCREEN - ಮನರಂಜನೆಯ ಸಂಪೂರ್ಣ ಲೋಕ!
ಇಲ್ಲಿ ನೀವು ಪಡಬಹುದಾದದ್ದೆಂದರೆ ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ಕಾಮೆಡಿ, ಎಂಟರ್‌ಟೈನ್ಮೆಂಟ್ ಶೋರ್ಟ್ಸ್, ಹಾಸ್ಯಭರಿತ ವಿಡಿಯೋಗಳು ಮತ್ತು ಅಪರೂಪದ ಕಥಾ ನಿರೂಪಣೆಗಳು. ನಿಮ್ಮ ದಿನವನ್ನು ಬೆಳಗಿಸಲು, ನಗಿಸಲು ಮತ್ತು ವಿಶ್ರಾಂತಿಗೆ ಹೊಸ ಆಯಾಮ ನೀಡಲು ನಮ್ಮ ಚಾನಲ್ ಇಲ್ಲಿದೆ.
ಮರೆಯದೇ ಸಬ್ಸ್ಕ್ರೈಬ್ ಮಾಡಿ, MAJAA SCREEN ನಿಮ್ಮ ಎಂಟರ್‌ಟೈನ್‌ಮೆಂಟ್ ಡೆಸ್ಟಿನೇಷನ್!

snippet.title: Teri Aa’n (Official Video) | Sabba | Black Virus | New Punjabi Song 2026 | Latest Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records presents Teri Aa’n ❤️, a Punjabi love story by Sabba that beautifully captures the power of true love.

Set against an emotional love story, Teri Aa’n conveys the idea that no matter the struggles, true love always finds its way and unites hearts. With heartfelt lyrics, soothing melodies, and Sabba’s raw, expressive voice, this love song perfectly connects with anyone who believes in deep, unconditional love.

Whether you're into Punjabi love songs, romantic Punjabi songs, or emotional songs that tell a story, this new song deserves a spot on your playlist. Perfect for late-night listening & long drives. 

👉 If you enjoy Sabba’s new songs like Jawani or Sohna Sohni, don’t miss this one. This latest song carries the same vibe and heartfelt emotion that you’ll definitely fall in love with. ❤️ Tune in now and feel the magic of love that never fades. 

#TeriAan #PunjabiSong #NewSong #BestPunjabiSongs #SabbaNewSong #SabbaPunjabiSongNew

snippet.title: Franklin Protects Magic Canvas! 😱 Brainrots Attack GTA 5 Malayalam
snippet.description:
Franklin Protects the Magic Canvas! 😱 Brainrots Attack GTA 5 Malayalam

Part 2 of the Magic Canvas story continues with Franklin, Shinchan & Pinchan testing their new water slides created using the magic canvas! 🎨💦 But while everything looks fun, a hidden danger is already getting closer… 😨

Three brainrots arrive near the shore searching for the magic canvas. They disguise themselves as humans and trick Michael to find out where the canvas is hidden. 👀

Franklin becomes suspicious and starts searching for Michael. Soon, he discovers the truth — the brainrots are planning to attack and take the MAGIC CANVAS! 😱

To keep it safe, Pinchan draws a flying plane using the canvas, and Shinchan escapes with it. But the flight goes out of control and they crash land on a mountain! ✈️💥

As the brainrots attack, Franklin rushes in to protect the magic canvas. In the final fight, Pinchan creates a powerful magic wand and Franklin uses it to defeat the brainrots and save the canvas! ⚡🔥

Will the magic canvas stay safe? Or will the brainrots return again?

👉 Watch till the end for a thrilling fight, suspense, and action-packed moments!

🎮 GTA 5 Malayalam Story Gameplay
🔥 Action | 😱 Suspense | 😂 Fun

🔔 Don’t forget to Like, Share & Subscribe for more GTA 5 Malayalam videos!

#GTA5Malayalam #Franklin #Shinchan #Brainrots #MagicCanvas #GTA5Mods #MalayalamGaming #GTA5Story #ViralGaming #GamingMalayalam

snippet.title: Sasirekha 8K Video | Mana ShankaraVaraPrasad Garu | Chiranjeevi, Nayanthara | Bheems | Anil Ravipudi
snippet.description:
Here’s the “Sasirekha” 8K Video Song featuring the legendary Chiranjeevi alongside Nayanthara, from the Mega Sankranthi Blockbuster Mana Shankaravaraprasad Garu - Pandagaki Vasthunnaru directed by Anil Ravipudi. With energetic music by Bheems Ceciroleo,

snippet.title: Prem Ki Leela | Krishnavataram | Shreya Ghoshal, Javed Ali, Irshad Kamil, Prasad S.
snippet.description:
Krishnavataram’s ‘Prem Ki Leela’ - A soul-stirring Anthem of Divine Love - In Theatres on 7th May

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Credits:  
Song: Prem Ki Leela 
Music Composer: Prasad S.

Vocals: Shreya Ghoshal, Javed Ali, Suvarna Tiwari 
 
Directed by: Hardik Gajjar 
Produced by: Sajan Raj Kurup, Shobha Sant 
Produced by: Poonam Shroff, Parth Gajjar 

Starring:  
Siddharth Gupta as Krishna  
Sanskruti Jayana as Satyabhama  
Sushmitha Bhat as Radha  
Nivaashiyni Krishnan as Rukmini 

Music Produced and Arranged by: Prasad S. 
Assistant to Prasad S.: Tushar J 
Mix & Master: Shadab Rayeen Asst. Jazbaat, Sohamm @New Edge Studios
Tutti Section: Yogesh More, Omkar Dhumal 
Flute: PMK Naveen Kumar 
Sarangi: Vanraj Shastri 
Rhythm Designed & Performed by: Krishna Kishor 
Percussion: KV Prasad, Rahul 
Music Supervisor: Piush K Setth 
Tabla & Tarang: Ganesh Rao, Ganapathy 
Additional Tabla : Prasad Padhye 
Backing Vocals: Deepanshi Nagar, Dhanshree Rajvarsh, Shikha Sonik, Shailjaa Upadhyay,Sanjana Arun 
Screenplay: Prakash Kapadia, Raam Mori & Hardik Gajjar

snippet.title: इकरार हो ना जाए | Zinda Dil | Udit Narayan Songs | Abbas | Ashima Bhalla
snippet.description:
2000 के दशक के सुनहरे दौर से, पेश है उदित नारायण की आवाज़ में प्यार और भावनाओं से भरी एक खूबसूरत प्रस्तुति - "इकरार हो ना जाए"! यह गाना हमें उस दौर की याद दिलाता है जब संगीत में सादगी और गहराई हुआ करती थी। उदित जी की आवाज़ में जो दर्द और मिठास है, वह हर सुनने वाले के दिल को छू जाती है।



Credits :

Song: Ikrar Ho Na Jaye
Album: Zinda Dil
Artist: Udit Narayan
Music Director: Nadeem-Shravan
Lyricist: Sameer 



Lyrics :

O ho ho ey hey hey
Iqaraar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
Hey hey hey.. Hey hey hey hey


Saagar ki maujein hain
Khulaa aasmaan hai
Dhadkan deevaani hai
Dilkash samaa hai
Dhadkan deevaani hai
Dilkash samaa hai
Khvaabon ke hamsafar
Kaa deedaar ho na jaaye
Khvaabon ke hamsafar
Kaa deedaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho ho ho ho
Hey hey hey.. Hey hey hey hey


Jee chaahe lahron se
Karoon main sharaarat
Inko bataa doon main
Mere dil ki chaahat
Inko bataa doon main
Mere dil ki chaahat
Koi deevaanaa meraa
Dildaar ho na jaaye
Koi deevaanaa meraa
Dildaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
O ho ho hey hey hey hey
Iqaraar ho na jaaye
Izahaar ho na jaaye
Is mausam mein kahin
Mujhe pyaar ho na jaaye
Hey hey hey.. Ey hey hey
O ho ho ey hey hey.

इस गाने में प्यार की कशिश और इजहार की मासूमियत को बड़ी खूबसूरती से दर्शाया गया है। यह उन लोगों के लिए एक तोहफा है जो आज भी सच्चे प्यार में विश्वास रखते हैं। इस गाने को सुनकर आप निश्चित रूप से अपने पुराने दिनों में खो जाएंगे और प्यार के रंग में रंग जाएंगे।

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

संगीत का जादू हमेशा बना रहे… #UditNarayan #HindiSongs #RomanticSongs #2000sMusic #LoveSongs #Bollywood

snippet.title: శనివారం రోజు గోవింద నామాలు వింటే కోటి జన్మల పుణ్యఫలం 🙏 | Govinda Namalu Full With Telugu Lyrics
snippet.description:
శనివారం రోజు గోవింద నామాలు వింటే కోటి జన్మల పుణ్యఫలం 🙏 | Govinda Namalu Full With Telugu Lyrics  


Listen to the sacred Govinda Namalu with Telugu lyrics on this special Saturday and receive divine blessings of Lord Sri Venkateswara Swamy. It is believed that chanting or hearing Govinda Namalu brings immense spiritual merit, equivalent to the blessings of countless lifetimes.

These powerful names of Lord Govinda purify the mind, remove negative energies, and attract wealth, happiness, and prosperity into life. Devotees believe that listening with true devotion helps remove obstacles and fulfills wishes.

Make this devotional chanting a part of your Saturday spiritual routine and invite the grace of Tirumala Balaji into your home. May your life be filled with peace, success, and divine blessings 🙏

snippet.title: TAJ - The Singh | Official Video | New Hindi Song 2026 | Rap Song Hindi | Sad Songs Hindi | Sad Song
snippet.description:
Voila Digi Private Limited presents TAJ, by The Singh. This is a beautiful sad song about two lovers being separated because of the world. 

TAJ is also available on all audio platforms:
Spotify: https://tinyurl.com/4p8h822r
Apple Music: https://tinyurl.com/vhzp2ahw
JioSaavn: https://tinyurl.com/4y477x3a
YouTube Music: https://tinyurl.com/4dfeha82
Amazon Music: https://tinyurl.com/wzxmy3ut
Gaana: https://tinyurl.com/ym3kenz7

Credits:
Singer / Composer / Lyricist: The Singh
Music Producer: ABS
Special Thanks: Karishma Chhajer
Video by: Sunix Thakor
Producers: Girish Jain & Vinit Jain

Lyrics:
Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Mita do kahaniya jo Taj pe likhi hai
Shah Jahan Mumtaz pe likhi hai
Meri kahani mere khaas ne likhi hai
Heer Ranjha chhodo, mere aaj pe likhi hai

Rago me rang kya khun ka alag hai
Roop Rang Jaati Karam bhi alag hai
Ab bolte ho duniya kya kahegi
Iss hisaab se toh jaana mera dharam bhi alag hai

Na bewafa hai woh, na mai bewafa hu
Muqaddar me rehna likha hi nahi hai
Keh do kaise bolu mai usse bewafa
Uska manpasand toh uska joda bhi nahi hai

Kaun jaane kitna dard saath me sahegi
Kisi gair mard saath saari umar woh rahegi
Ishq haar jaata har janam mein apno ke hi aage
Ab yeh na socho aake tumse duniya kya kahegi

Chalo muskurake aakhri vida do
Dil se mera jaana naam bhi hata do
Koi puche tumse kisne ki daga
Toh naam lena mera 
Usko mujkho bewafa bata do

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Uski doli mera janaza saja do
Kya khata hai meri koi mujhe khata toh bata do
Kyu dil se chahana kisi ko gunah ban gaya hai
Hai gunah toh jaake koi Taj ko gira do 

Jiske dhoke me bhi pyaar ho
Jiske dhoke me bhi pyaar ho
Maine itna pyaara dhokebaaz nahi dekha
Beshaq ishq ki nishaani hai Taj
Magar kabhi Mumtaz ne Taj Nahi dekha

For enquiries: contact@voiladigi.in

snippet.title: I Am Dynamite 🔥 | Official Music Video - DianaMYT Ft. Chandan Shetty | Vijeth Krishna
snippet.description:
This is not just a music video. This is an ignition 🔥

“I Am Dynamite” introduces a new force to the global pop scene — Diana-MYT. A voice that blends attitude, fire, and international sound, stepping out from Mysore to the world stage with fearless energy.

Powered by the vision of @ChandanShettykannada , this project is more than a debut — it’s the beginning of a movement. A new pop identity. A new sound from India is ready to go global.

Every frame, every beat, every word is designed to spark something bigger.

If you’re watching this now… you’re witnessing the birth of a new popstar.

Turn it up. Feel the energy.  
This is Diana-MYT.  
This is Dynamite. 🔥

DianaMYT Ft. Chandan Shetty
Produced By: CS Records 
Directed By: Dilpreetvfx X Rupan Bal 
VFX Supervisor / VFX director: Dilpreetvfx 
Edit / Di Colourist: Dilpreetvfx 
Assistant Director: Harsh Nahar 
Dop: Rahul Sabharwal 
Line Producer: Harsh Nahar 
Music - Lyrics - Mix Master: Vijeth Krishna 
Concept: Chandan Shetty 
Costume Designer: Bharath Sagar
Make-up and Hairstyle: Queenandro, Robin 
2nd Makeup: Mamta Makeover
CGI: Elnorth Studio (Team: Matt Gorski, Derek Mckay, Allen weichman, Sam)
3D Generalist/Co-Ordinator: Savi Kohard
Keying & Roto: Gaganvfx
Jimmy Jib: Munish 
Steady cam: Sandeep
Digital Promotions: Digital Magnet Media - Dhanu Krishnaa

snippet.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. 💫

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don’t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Tell us in the comments — is this your favorite romantic Bollywood song?

👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Times Music - https://bit.ly/tmchnl

Feel the magic of love with Teri Ore, a love song from Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Starring the evergreen Bollywood jodi Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif, known for their incredible on-screen chemistry, this romantic track beautifully captures the essence of love. Sung by Rahat Fateh Ali Khan and Shreya Ghoshal, with music by Pritam, Teri Ore remains one of the most loved Bollywood love songs.

This timeless Hindi romantic song is known for its soothing melody, heartfelt lyrics, and unforgettable visuals. Whether you're in love or simply enjoy classical Bollywood music, Teri Ore creates a deep emotional connection that stays with you. 💫

The iconic pairing of Akshay Kumar and Katrina Kaif shines throughout the song. To enjoy more of their magical chemistry, don’t miss songs from Welcome, along with other hit tracks from Singh Is Kinng like Jee Karda, Talli Hua, and Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Tell us in the comments — is this your favorite romantic Bollywood song?

Kheenche mujhe koyi dor teri ore

khulti fizayen khulti ghataye

Dil pe nahi koyi jor koyi jor

de-DE.title: Teri Ore (Liedtext-Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Liebeslied
de-DE.description:
Spüre die Magie der Liebe mit „Teri Ore“, einem Liebeslied aus „Singh Is Kinng“ 💖✨

Mit dem unvergesslichen Bollywood-Traumpaar Akshay Kumar und Katrina Kaif, bekannt für ihre unglaubliche Leinwandchemie, fängt dieser romantische Song die Essenz der Liebe wunderschön ein. Gesungen von Rahat Fateh Ali Khan und Shreya Ghoshal, mit Musik von Pritam, zählt „Teri Ore“ zu den beliebtesten Bollywood-Liebesliedern.

Dieses zeitlose Hindi-Liebeslied ist bekannt für seine sanfte Melodie, die gefühlvollen Texte und die unvergesslichen Bilder. Ob verliebt oder einfach nur ein Fan klassischer Bollywood-Musik – „Teri Ore“ schafft eine tiefe emotionale Verbindung, die lange anhält. 💫

Das legendäre Paar Akshay Kumar und Katrina Kaif strahlt im gesamten Song. Um mehr von ihrer magischen Chemie zu erleben, solltest du dir auch die Songs aus „Welcome“ sowie weitere Hits aus „Singh Is Kinng“ wie „Jee Karda“, „Talli Hua“ und „Bhootni Ke“ anhören. 🎶

💬 Verratet uns in den Kommentaren: Ist das euer liebster romantischer Bollywood-Song?

hi.title: Teri Ore (Lyrical Video) | Singh Is Kinng | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Love Song
hi.description:
'सिंह इज़ किंग' के प्रेम गीत 'तेरी ओर' के साथ प्यार के जादू को महसूस करें 💖✨

अत्यंत लोकप्रिय बॉलीवुड जोड़ी अक्षय कुमार और कैटरीना कैफ की इस रोमांटिक फिल्म में, जो अपनी बेमिसाल केमिस्ट्री के लिए जाने जाते हैं, प्यार का सार खूबसूरती से बयां किया गया है। राहत फतेह अली खान और श्रेया घोषाल द्वारा गाए गए और प्रीतम द्वारा संगीतबद्ध किए गए 'तेरी ओर' आज भी बॉलीवुड के सबसे प्रिय प्रेम गीतों में से एक है।

यह सदाबहार हिंदी रोमांटिक गीत अपनी मधुर धुन, दिल को छू लेने वाले बोल और अविस्मरणीय दृश्यों के लिए जाना जाता है। चाहे आप प्यार में हों या सिर्फ क्लासिकल बॉलीवुड संगीत के शौकीन हों, 'तेरी ओर' एक गहरा भावनात्मक जुड़ाव पैदा करता है जो हमेशा आपके साथ रहता है। 💫

अक्षय कुमार और कैटरीना कैफ की यह प्रतिष्ठित जोड़ी पूरे गाने में चमकती है। उनकी जादुई केमिस्ट्री का और आनंद लेने के लिए, 'वेलकम' के गानों के साथ-साथ 'सिंह इज़ किंग' के अन्य हिट गाने जैसे 'जी करदा', 'तल्ली हुआ' और 'भूतनी के' देखना न भूलें। 🎶

💬 हमें कमेंट्स में बताएं — क्या यह आपका पसंदीदा रोमांटिक बॉलीवुड गाना है?

दिल खो गया हो गया किसी का,
अब रास्ता मिल गया ख़ुशी का
आँखों में है ख़ब सा किसी
का, अब रास्ता मिल गया ख़ुशी का
रिश्ता नया रब्बा, दिल छू रहा है
खींचे मुझे कोई दो तेरी ओर
(तेरी अयस्क, तेरी अयस्क, तेरी अयस्क हाय रब्बा

सर पे नया है आसमां
चारो दिशाएं हँसे बुलाए,
क्यों सब हुए हैं मेहरबान
हा इंसान तो यही रब्बा
कसम से पता है
दिल पे नहीं कोई जोर कोई जोर
(तेरी अयस्क, तेरी अयस्क, तेरी अयस्क हाय रब्बा
टेरी अयस्क, टेरी अयस्क, टेरी अयस्क) - (2)

एक हीर थी और एक रांझा,
कहते हैं मेरे गाँव में
सच्चा हो दिल तो सौ मस्किलों
हो, झुकता नसीबा पौ मैं
हो हो आंचल तेरा रब्बा
फलक बन गया है
अब इसका नहीं कोई ओर कोई छोरा
(तेरी अयस्क, तेरी अयस्क, तेरी अयस्क हाय रब्बा
टेरी अयस्क, टेरी अयस्क, टेरी अयस्क) - (2)

pt-BR.title: Teri Ore (vídeo lírico) | Singh é rei | Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Canção de amor
pt-BR.description:
Sinta a magia do amor com Teri Ore, uma canção romântica de Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Estrelada pela dupla icônica de Bollywood, Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif, conhecidos por sua incrível química em cena, esta canção romântica captura lindamente a essência do amor. Cantada por Rahat Fateh Ali Khan e Shreya Ghoshal, com música de Pritam, Teri Ore continua sendo uma das canções de amor mais amadas de Bollywood.

Esta canção romântica hindi atemporal é conhecida por sua melodia suave, letra emocionante e visuais inesquecíveis. Seja você apaixonado ou simplesmente um apreciador da música clássica de Bollywood, Teri Ore cria uma conexão emocional profunda que permanece com você. 💫

A dupla icônica de Akshay Kumar e Katrina Kaif brilha ao longo da música. Para apreciar ainda mais a química mágica deles, não perca as músicas de Welcome, além de outros sucessos de Singh Is Kinng, como Jee Karda, Talli Hua e Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Conte para nós nos comentários: essa é a sua música romântica favorita de Bollywood?

id.title: Teri Ore (Video Lirik) | Singh Adalah Raja | Akshay Kumar, Katrina Kaif | Rahat, Shreya | Lagu Cinta
id.description:
Rasakan keajaiban cinta dengan Teri Ore, lagu cinta dari film Singh Is Kinng 💖✨

Dibintangi oleh pasangan Bollywood abadi Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif, yang dikenal karena chemistry luar biasa mereka di layar, lagu romantis ini dengan indah menangkap esensi cinta. Dinyanyikan oleh Rahat Fateh Ali Khan dan Shreya Ghoshal, dengan musik oleh Pritam, Teri Ore tetap menjadi salah satu lagu cinta Bollywood yang paling dicintai.

Lagu romantis Hindi abadi ini dikenal karena melodi yang menenangkan, lirik yang menyentuh hati, dan visual yang tak terlupakan. Baik Anda sedang jatuh cinta atau sekadar menikmati musik Bollywood klasik, Teri Ore menciptakan koneksi emosional yang dalam yang akan selalu Anda ingat. 💫

Pasangan ikonik Akshay Kumar dan Katrina Kaif bersinar sepanjang lagu. Untuk menikmati lebih banyak chemistry magis mereka, jangan lewatkan lagu-lagu dari Welcome, bersama dengan lagu-lagu hits lainnya dari Singh Is Kinng seperti Jee Karda, Talli Hua, dan Bhootni Ke. 🎶

💬 Beri tahu kami di kolom komentar — apakah ini lagu Bollywood romantis favoritmu?

snippet.title: Bangles (Official #Video) Sanju Rathod Ft. Isha Malviya | G-Spark | #Marathi Pop 2026 | बांगडी
snippet.description:
|| 🕉 || 
Sanju Rathod presents the official music video of Bangles. After the success of Shaky, he reunites with Isha Malviya for a track that blends Maharashtrian roots with reggae and pop. Set in Cool Wadi, the video follows a spirited, fashion-forward Isha as Sanju introduces her to traditional adornments like bangles, symbolizing a deeper cultural connection.

snippet.description:
माधुरी दीक्षित - चोली के पीछे क्या है ? | Choli Ke Peeche Kya Hai - 8K Song | Khal Nayak (1993) 

#cholikepeechekyahai #alkayagnik #madhuridixit

Song Credits:
Song: Choli Ke Peeche Kya Hai 
Movie:  Khal Nayak (1993)
Singer: Alka Yagnik & Ila Arun
Composer: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyrics: Anand Bakshi

Movie Credits:
Cast : Sanjay Dutt, Jackie Shroff, Madhuri Dixit, Raakhee, Anupam Kher
Director : Subhash Ghai
Producer : Subhash Ghai

Lyrics:

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Choli Ke Peechhe Kya Hai,
Choli Ke Peechhe
Choli Ke Peechhe Kya Hai,
Choli Ke Peechhe
Chunari Ke Niche Kya Hai,
Chunari Ke Niche

Ho Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Choli Mein Dil Hai Mera,
Chunari Mein Dil Hai Mera
Yeh Dil Mein Dungi Mere Yar Ko, Pyar Ko
Aah Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Lakhon Deewane Tere, Lakhon Deewane
Aashiq Purane Tere, Aashiq Purane
Ho Aashiq Mila Naa Aisa Hmmm,
Meri Pasand Jaisa Hmmm
Be Dil Shahar Yeh Aisa,
Kya Karu Kya Karu
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Resham Kaa Lahanga Meraa,
Resham Kaa Lahanga
Lahanga Hai Mahanga Meraa,
Ahanga Hai Mahanga
Lahanga Utha Ke Chalu,
Ghunghat Gira Ke Chalu
Kya Kya Bacha Ke Chalu Ramaji Ramaji
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Isako Bachalo Babu, Iss Ko Bachalo
Dil Me Chhupalo Babu, Dil Mein Chhupalo
Ho Aashiq Pade Hain Pichhe O Ho
Koyi Idhar Ko Khinche Hmmm
Koyi Udhar Ko Khinche Kya Karu Kya Karu
Hay Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Hai Shadi Karado Meri O Ho,
Shadi Karado Hmmm
Doli Sajado Meri Doli
Saja Do Ah Ha Ah Ha
Sautan Bana Naa Jaye,
Jogan Bana Naa Jaye
Joban Saha Naa Jaye
Kya Karu, Kya Karu Hai Chhori
Ku Ku Ku…………

Are Ladaki Ho Kaisi Bolo,
Ladaki Ho Kaisi
Ladaka Ho Kaisa Bolo
Ladaka Ho Kaisa
Ho Ladaki Ho Mere Jaisi Aah Ha,
Ladaka Ho Tere Jaisa Wah Wah
Aaye Maja Phir Kaisa,
Pyar Kaa Pyar Kaa Wah
Ku Ku Ku…………

Ku Ku Ku Ku Ku…………
Ho…Jhumari Kaa Jumaru Ban Ja,
Jhumari Kaa Jumaru Kich Kich
Payal Kaa, Ghungharu Ban Ja
Payal Kaa Ghungaru Kich Kich
Meri Salami Kar Le, Meri Ghulami Kar Le
Hoga Too Hoga Koyi
Badashah, Badashah Are Jan
Ku Ku Ku…………

This playlist features the soulful voice of Anuradha Paudwal, bringing you the best 80s 90s old Hindi love songs filled with romance, emotion, and unforgettable melodies. These Sadabahar songs continue to live in the hearts of millions.

Relive the golden era of Hindi music with evergreen romantic hits that are perfect for relaxation, studying, long drives, and late night listening. Each song captures the magic of love and nostalgia from the 80s and 90s Bollywood era.

snippet.title: Escaping Choo Choo Charles On Train in Minecraft 😱
snippet.description:
Today we tried to survive one of the most terrifying creatures in Minecraft…

Choo Choo Charles.

But this time, we’re not safe…
We’re trapped on a moving Indian train in the middle of nowhere.

No escape. No hiding. Just tracks… and something chasing us.

As the train keeps moving, Charles gets closer… and things start going very wrong.

👀 Watch till the end to see if we survive or get hunted down.

If you enjoy Minecraft horror and survival challenges, LIKE & SUBSCRIBE for more!

#Minecraft #ChooChooCharles #MinecraftHorror #Survival

snippet.title: Hentok Konyak - Nyu Wan Wao (Official Music Video) @Aphewangsa
snippet.description:
My First Original Song — A Tribute to My Mother

This debut original composition is a deeply personal tribute to my mother, whose passing when I was six years old profoundly influenced the course of my life. This piece reflects a journey of love, loss, and resilience, carried forward by her enduring memory.


Written & Composed by: Hentok Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/hentok_konyak?igsh=ZmNkZ2lrZGozOXY2


Cast:

•Aphe Konyakhttps://www.instagram.com/aphe_cooks_and_vlogs2712?igsh=ams4aXZ5Z2x3M3dh
•Rathai
•Amenla Pongenhttps://www.instagram.com/amen90105?igsh=cmV0bHdjeTE1bW4w


Video Credits:

•Cinematography by Studio LAGOMhttps://www.instagram.com/studiolagom__?igsh=dGV4Y2VnM3o3anZ4
•Directed by Akum Denhttps://www.instagram.com/aakumden?igsh=c3p0ODY0ejVjMTlh
•Viky Meiteihttps://www.instagram.com/vm_videosolution?igsh=MWN6cHJvNW5qdnljdA==
•Manminder Singhhttps://www.instagram.com/manni0.9?igsh=cWV4bTVueno3Z2tl


Script Written by: Chongboi Singsonhttps://www.instagram.com/writes_cb?igsh=aTRwOWQ1eTBqanlw



Lyrics Translated by: Leiwang Thttps://www.instagram.com/_alei_yanlem?igsh=dWZzOXZtczRzY3Fk


Special Thanks:

We extend our sincere gratitude to Mr. & Mrs. Tongnyei Konyak for permitting us to feature their children.


Special thanks to Miss Amenla Pongen & Mrs. Pheying Konyak for coordinating the children for the video cast.


We are also grateful to Mr. & Mrs. Tashi Ozukum for generously providing their home, along with their warm hospitality and invaluable support throughout the production.





LYRICS 

Verse 1
Kahtok nyu me üya tuh shüo 
Hongli mongmei pu yünang pe
Nyem ha me muh khah ha min pha
Puhpu humnung nyu li phei me

Chorus 
Onyu nang e puhpu nang ha tüo 
Nang ngoh pu nyoi te yah tei yah
Nyu wan wao e ü-üyin mükphe shaha
Phei nyih nyu a lin kúm

Verse 2
Shin mang me nge pu te nohoi
Mangmeng üja she ie nang ki
Onyu tüme ame hüo hah
Hüo lak nyoi üte ie tüm pha


Verse 3
Puhpu humnung nyu yünang ma
Noksha phongjong wing e mah nang
Yoi nyu mongmeng ne tah túm hah 
Li phei me yung pu jajang ja

Verse 4
Shaji onyu nang ha tüo a
Nang monghum lak ju ngoi tüki
Nang ha ükem pa yung shon pu
Ngao wing jai ya ken pu onyu..

#mothersday #song #tribute #emotional #song #truestory #hentok #konyak

Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

Main To Apne Saajan Ke Dwaar Chali Re

snippet.title: Banjaare - Bairan (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
⏬ Download / Stream: 
https://open.spotify.com/track/4iLMuGacSurMAKeQyIwFeJ

⚡️ Banjaare:
https://www.instagram.com/official_banjaare

⚡️ Creative Chaos:
https://soundcloud.com/creativchaos
https://open.spotify.com/user/creativchaos
https://www.tiktok.com/@creative.chaos_
https://www.facebook.com/creatvchaos
https://x.com/crevtivechaos
https://www.instagram.com/creativ.chaos

Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaarе ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue mеin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

📷 Photo:
https://unsplash.com

🚫 If you want to use this music in your video you will need permission from the artist or label.

#Banjaare #Bairan #SpedSlowChaos #SpeedUp #SpedUp #Slowed #SlowedReverb #Music #Vocals #Lyrics #LyricVideo #TopHits #Hits

hi.description:
आज हम खेल रहे हैं ग्रैनी 3 का ट्रेन एस्केप! शिवा और कंज़ो मिलकर ग्रैनी के घर से ट्रेन लेकर भाग रहे हैं। इस वीडियो में आपको मिलेगा मज़ेदार गेमप्ले के पल, थोड़ा सा सस्पेंस और थोड़ा सा डर।

अस्वीकरण

यह वीडियो केवल मनोरंजन के लिए है। इसमें डरावने दृश्य और अचानक डराने वाले दृश्य हो सकते हैं। कमज़ोर दिल वाले लोगों और छोटे बच्चों को इससे दूर रहने की सलाह दी जाती है।
इसका किसी भी वास्तविक घटना, व्यक्ति या स्थान से कोई संबंध नहीं है।

snippet.title: Thippukuntannav Video Telugu Lyrics | Band Melam | Harsh Roshan,Sridevi | Vijai Bulganin|Ramu Rathod
snippet.description:
Watch & Enjoy #Thippukuntannav Video Song with Telugu Lyrics from the Movie #BandMelam 

#BandMelamMovie #HarshRoshan #Sridevi #SathishJavvaji #VijaiBulganin #RamuRathod #TeluguSongs #TrendingTeluguSongs #ViralSongs #TeluguLyricalSongs #TrendingMusic #TeluguSongs2026 #MaaPaataMeeNota

🎧 Song Credits🎙
 
Song Name: Thippukuntannav
Lyrics & Tune: Chandrabose
Singers: Ramu Rathod & Aditi Bhavaraju
Music Director: Vijai Bulganin
Choreographer: Venkatesh Kapu

Programming: Madeen Sk 
Frets: Subhani
Flute: Promod umapathi 
Rhythms: Santhosh and Shanker Singh 
Mixed and mastered: Ijaz, Chennai 

Cast & Crew Details:
 
Cast: Harsh Roshan, Sridevi, Sai Kumar & Others.
 
Technical Crew:
A Kona Venkat Production
Banner: Kona Film Corporation
Presented by Mango Mass Media
Producers: Kavya & Shravya
Co-Producer: Sivaraju Pranav
Writer & Director: Sathish Javvaji
Music: Vijai Bulganin
Screenplay and Editing: Siva Mupparaju
DOP: Satish Mutyala
Lyricist: Chadrabose 
Art Director: Narni Srinivas
Costume designer: Nandhana Gayathri
VFX: GRAVITY
Marketing: Whacked Out Media
PRO: Vamsi Kaka 
Audio On: Aditya Music 

Thippukuntannav Video Song Telugu Lyrics:-

బల్లెం చుట్టూ ఈగ లెక్క…
మంచం చుట్టూ దోమ లెక్క…
 
బల్లెం చుట్టూ ఈగ లెక్క
మంచం చుట్టూ దోమ లెక్క
గుడి చుట్టూ భక్తుని లెక్క
బారు చుట్టూ తాగుబోతు లెక్క..
తిప్పుకుంటాన్నవ్.. తిప్పుకుంటాన్నవ్
నన్నే నీ చుట్టూ తిప్పు తిప్పుకుంటాన్నవ్
 
యహే తిప్పుకుంటాన్నవ్.. తిప్పుకుంటాన్నవ్
నన్నే నీ చుట్టూ తిప్పు తిప్పేస్కుంటనావ్
 
పచ్చని లంగా చుట్టి ఎరెర్రనీ వోణి ఏసి

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chhota Farmani Naaz Nagin Si Lugai New haryanvi Song 1080P
snippet.description:
#terabalamchota  #NaganSiLugai #Naazmusic
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

snippet.title: तू इस तरह से मेरी ज़िन्दगी में | Aap To Aise Na The | Mohammed Rafi Songs | Om Shivpuri
snippet.description:
मोहम्मद रफ़ी साहब, एक ऐसी आवाज़ जो आज भी हमारे दिलों में बसी है। उनकी आवाज़ में एक दर्द है, एक प्यार है, जो सीधे दिल को छू जाता है। 80 के दशक के उनके रोमांटिक गाने आज भी हर प्यार करने वाले की पसंद हैं। 'तू इस तरह से मेरी ज़िन्दगी में' एक ऐसा ही नगमा है, जो प्यार की गहराई को बयां करता है। रफ़ी साहब के गाये इस गाने में प्यार की मासूमियत, विरह की पीड़ा और मिलन की आस छुपी हुई है। यह गाना हमें उस दौर में ले जाता है जब प्यार इज़हार करने के लिए शब्दों की ज़रूरत नहीं होती थी, बस आँखों ही आँखों में सब कुछ कह दिया जाता था।


Credits :

Song: Tu Is Tarah Se Mere Zindagi Main
Album: Aap To Aise Na The
Artist: Mohammed Rafi
Music Director: Usha Khanna
Lyricist: Nida Fazli 


ऐसे ही और भी कई गाने हैं रफ़ी साहब के, जो आज भी हमें सुकून देते हैं और प्यार की याद दिलाते हैं। उनकी आवाज़ में एक जादू है, जो हमें हमेशा के लिए उनका दीवाना बना देता है। आइए, इस खूबसूरत गाने को सुनें और रफ़ी साहब की आवाज़ के जादू में खो जाएं।

अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया हो, तो इसे लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करना न भूलें।

Let the magic of music live on…

➟ 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐜𝐡 𝐮𝐬 𝐚𝐭: Popskopemusicofficial@gmail.com

📝 𝐆𝐮𝐣𝐚𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢 𝐋𝐲𝐫𝐢𝐜𝐬 :)
પણ આસા ઘૂંઘટડે હાલી આવતી, 
અરર રે મને ખોબલીયે પોણી પાવતી પણ આ તો વઢીયાર ની, 
એ વઢિયાર ની હતી કાંચ પૂતળી ,
અરર રે  મારી નિંદ્રા આવે વેરણ કરી ગઈ...(2)  

એનું રૂપ રૂપાળું જોઈ મને નિંદરડી ના આવે...(2)
હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલણ મીઠા પોણી પાવે... 
હો એણે પગમાં પેરી મોજડી એની ઝાંઝરિયું ખખડાવે 
હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલણ મીઠા પોણી પાવે... 

હો. રૂપાળું રૂપ લઈને ક્યાં તમે જાશો, 
અમારા દલડાંનાં રોણી ક્યારે થાશો...
હો. મન સાયબાના ઝીલણ મળવા દોડી આવે 
હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલુ  મીઠા પોણી પાવે...(2)

હો. નાજુક નમણી ને કાયા એની ઉજળી 
ગોમને પાદર થયો ભેટાલો જોવા મને મળી
હો. હો. ઘડનાર રે તને ઘડી તું પારસ પુતળી, 
પ્રેમ નો ખીલ્યો બગીચો ને એમાં ગુલાબ ની કળી... 

હો. આશી ઓઢણી માં લાગે રૂપ નો ચાંદલિયો,
રૂપાળા રૂપ ને  જોઈ ભાન હું તો ભુલીયો...
હો. વાગડ માં વાતો કરતી ,પાપણ નામણા રે પલકારે,
હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલુ  મીઠા પોણી પાવે...(2)

હો. વાલ કરનારી વાલી ક્યારે ઘેર આવશે,
હાથના ઘડ્યા રોટલા મને એના હાથે ભાવશે...

કોણ હમજાવે જીરવીના મન નહિ લાગશે... 

હો. પરિયો ના દેશ થી આઈ પરીયે રૂપાળી

અરર રે મને ખોબલીયે પોણી પાવતી પણ આ તો વઢીયાર ની, 
એ વઢિયાર ની હતી કાંચ પૂતળી ,
અરર રે  મારી નિંદ્રા આવે વેરણ કરી ગઈ...(2)  

એનું રૂપ રૂપાળું જોઈ મને નિંદરડી ના આવે...(2)
હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલણ મીઠા પોણી પાવે... 
હો એણે પગમાં પેરી મોજડી એની ઝાંઝરિયું ખખડાવે 
હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલણ મીઠા પોણી પાવે... 

હો. રૂપાળું રૂપ લઈને ક્યાં તમે જાશો, 
અમારા દલડાંનાં રોણી ક્યારે થાશો...
હો. મન સાયબાના ઝીલણ મળવા દોડી આવે 
હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલુ  મીઠા પોણી પાવે...(2)

હો. નાજુક નમણી ને કાયા એની ઉજળી 
ગોમને પાદર થયો ભેટાલો જોવા મને મળી
હો. હો. ઘડનાર રે તને ઘડી તું પારસ પુતળી, 
પ્રેમ નો ખીલ્યો બગીચો ને એમાં ગુલાબ ની કળી... 

હો. આશી ઓઢણી માં લાગે રૂપ નો ચાંદલિયો,
રૂપાળા રૂપ ને  જોઈ ભાન હું તો ભુલીયો...
હો. વાગડ માં વાતો કરતી ,પાપણ નામણા રે પલકારે,
હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલુ  મીઠા પોણી પાવે...(2)

હો. વાલ કરનારી વાલી ક્યારે ઘેર આવશે,

મીઠું  મલકાની હૈયે હેત હરખ ના ઢાણી...
હો. હાથ પકડી હરે હાલે  જાણે સિંહણ હાલી આવે

હા હા રે વાગડ ની ઝીલણ  મીઠા પોણી પાવે

હો.. માથે હાથ રાખી બોલી હજુ વાર લાગશે, 
કોણ હમજાવે જીરવીના મન નહિ લાગશે... 

હો. પરિયો ના દેશ થી આઈ પરીયે રૂપાળી 
મીઠું  મલકાની હૈયે હેત હરખ ના ઢાણી...
હો. હાથ પકડી હરે હાલે  જાણે સિંહણ હાલી આવે 

હા હા રે વઢીયાર ની ઝીલણ  મીઠા પોણી પાવે
હા હા રે વાગડ ની ઝીલણ  મીઠા પોણી પાવે
